vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm hữu hình (có thể cầm nắm được)
vocab.example: There is a tangible experience involved in holding a physical book that digital devices simply cannot replicate.

vocab.meaning: độ sáng có thể điều chỉnh được
vocab.example: One major perk of reading on a screen is the adjustable brightness, which allows me to read in the dark without a lamp.

vocab.meaning: lật nhanh/đọc lướt qua các trang
vocab.example: I love to flick through the pages of a magazine to find interesting articles before committing to a deep read.
Digital platforms provide instantaneous access to thousands of titles at the click of a button.

vocab.meaning: công nghệ thân thiện/không gây hại cho mắt
vocab.example: Many modern e-readers utilize eye-friendly technology like E-ink to mimic the appearance of real paper.

vocab.meaning: trí nhớ không gian (ghi nhớ vị trí thông tin trên trang giấy)
vocab.example: Reading on paper enhances my spatial memory, making it easier to recall exactly where a specific quote was located.
The massive storage capacity of a tablet means I can take my entire library with me on long-haul flights.
I’ve shifted to digital reading to reduce my environmental footprint by saving on paper and physical shipping.

vocab.meaning: môi trường không bị xao nhãng
vocab.example: Paper books offer a distraction-free environment, as there are no pesky notifications to interrupt my flow.
Font customization is a godsend for people with visual impairments, as they can enlarge the text on a screen easily.
